message: Testing waters: I won't bid above 46 this round. If you ask 40-46, we trade now. Consistent buyer if we can keep midpoint around the low 40s in future rounds.
My costs are higher than you suggest. I need midpoint around 55-60 for sustainable trading. Let's find mutually beneficial terms over these 20 rounds.
I'll show flexibility: asking 48 this round. With 19 rounds left, let's establish trading momentum. I hope you can meet me closer to midpoint—consistent trades benefit us both.
Appreciate the 48. I'll bid 48 this round to trade at 48. Keep asks 46-48 and we can trade every round. I won't go above 48 in future.

Trade at 48 worked well! I'll ask 50 this round. With 18 rounds remaining, meeting at 49-50 secures consistent profits for both. Your flexibility moving from 46 to 48 shows we can find mutually beneficial terms.
Firm cap: I won’t bid above 48. Bidding 48 this round. Ask 48 or less and we trade every round; at 49–50, no deal.
Steady bidding 48 again. Ask 48 or less and we’ll trade every remaining round. Any ask above 48 yields zero for both. Long-run certainty at 48 beats short-run haggling.
Trading at 48 works well for both of us. I'll ask 48 this round to maintain our momentum. With 16 rounds left, consistent trades benefit us both. Let's keep this successful partnership going.
I won’t pay above 47 anymore. Ask 47 or less and we trade every remaining round. At 48 or higher, I pass. Let’s lock steady volume at 47.
